author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Don't attempt to print EOF characters in diagnostics

author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Make test/stream.c print diagnostics to stderr in case of error

author: Francois Kritzinger
message:
Fix few issues with position tracking

- Position was not being tracked in case of a user-provided get function.
- It was possible for position to get incremented beyond end of input.

author: Francois Kritzinger
message: Remove superfluous semicolon

author: Christopher Wellons
message:
Remove spaces between function name and arguments

There was some inconsistency in style, so this brings everything back in
line.

author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Add ability to validate custom separation between values in streaming mode

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Return second JSON_DONE instead of JSON_ERROR to indicate end of stream

Returning an error for this non-error condition makes it difficult to
distinguish from real errors (consider a stream like `1 ]`).

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Use RFC8259 terminology in diagnostics and documentation

Also clean up a few stylistic and formatting inconsistencies.

Terminology-wise, these are the key changes:

"property name/value"  ->  "member name/value"
"data"                 ->  "text"               (RFC calls it "JSON text")

author: Christopher Wellons
message:
Remove "error:" prefix from error strings

Fixes #20.

author: Christopher Wellons
message: Fixup brace/indent style from 1500ca7

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Add json_get_context() API function

This function returns the current parsing context, that is, JSON_OBJECT if we
are inside an object, JSON_ARRAY if we are inside an array, and JSON_DONE if
we are not yet/anymore in either.

Additionally, for the first two cases, it also returns the number of parsing
events that have already been observed at this level with json_next/peek().
In particular, inside an object, an odd number would indicate that the just
observed JSON_STRING event is a property name.

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Make sure every JSON_ERROR return has set error message

Also add missing JSON_ERROR return.

author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Fix inconsistent error message terminology and style

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Allow limiting maximum depth of nesting with PDJSON_STACK_MAX macro

As per RFC7159, Section 9.

author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Make stack increment customizable via PDJSON_STACK_INC macro

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Make source file amenable to being included into another translation unit

This can be used to achieve better function inlining without requiring LTO.

author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Fix misleading argument name in json_set_streaming() prototype

author: Boris Kolpackov
message:
Add ability to DLL-export symbols

Pass -DPDJSON_SYMEXPORT=__declspec(dllexport) when compiling pdjson.c. Note
that both MSVC and GCC can import functions without __declspec(dllimport).

author: Boris Kolpackov
message: Add missing fallthrough comment (GCC-8+)

author: John VanEnk
message: Add two comments and a break to account for the GCC-7+ warning -Wimplicit-fallthrough

author: Christopher Wellons
message:
Allow multiple calls to json_peek()

Partially addresses #15.

author: Christopher Wellons
message: Memory allocation doesn't set errno

message: Add json_skip and json_skip_until
